_README: Vercel Edge Config seed data — copy to https://vercel.com/dashboard/stores/{id}/items after creating Edge Config and attaching to jianyuan-life project. v5.10.344 (Sprint 6 收尾)

blocked_ips._description: 已知惡意 IP / range — 加入規則:server logs 看到單 IP 1 hr > 1000 次 4xx/5xx 即加。每月 review。

allowed_ips._description: 信任 IP(Stripe webhook 等)— 已 hardcode 在 lib/security/ip-blocklist.ts、Edge Config 加項目可動態擴展

blocked_countries._description: geo block 國家(ISO-3166-1 alpha-2、e.g. KP/IR)— 預設空、需要時加

_setup_steps: 1. Vercel Dashboard → Storage → Create Edge Config → name: jianyuan-blocklist
2. Attach to jianyuan-life project(自動注入 EDGE_CONFIG env)
3. 進 Edge Config items 介面、加 3 個 key(blocked_ips / allowed_ips / blocked_countries)、value 從本檔複製
4. 之後改 IP 直接在 Edge Config UI 改、邊緣秒級全球同步、不需 deploy
